titleStmt.title: SII 18.150: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 150. (B.K. No. 72 of 1933-34.) NARAGUND (KASBA), NARAGUND PETHA, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in front of the Jōḍu Hanumān temple.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Pratāpachakravarti Jagadēkamalladēva, is dated in the 10th year of his reign, Prabhava, Śrāvaṇa Amāvāsyā, Monday, Pushya-nakshatra, corresponding to A.D. 1147, July 28, Monday, f.d.t. ·38; ·18.

It records a grant of land to god Kīrtīnārāyaṇadēva made by the brothers Śaṅkara and Nārāyaṇābhaṭṭa. The gift land was obtained by them from the Mahājanas of the agrahāra Naṟugunda. The agrahāra and its Mahājanas are highly praised.
The record was composed by Sarvajña-Paṭṭavardhana and was engraved by Chiṇṇōja. Tīka of Kesuvāya family copied it on stone.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī vārāhaṁ vahatō vapuḥ pṟuthutaraṁ nārāyaṇasyāsya vaḥ kṣōṇīvīkṣaṇa kānkṣiṇaḥ kṣitipatēḥ kṣīvēkṣitō rakṣatu .
yasyāśēṣapatērvviṣāṇa Uditā saiṣā jigīṣōrvviṭaṁ kastūryyāmarakalpita sya tiḷakasyōrvvīśriyaṁ śiśriyē . namaḥ .
yasya daṁṣṭrāṁkurē lagnā sākṣānmakṣīyatē kṣitiḥ . namō varāharūpāya viṣṇavē prabhaviṣṇavē . gaṇēśa .
© śrīpatiya rucirataranābhīpadmadoḷogedanab�jaṁ tajjātōrvvīpāḷānvayadoḷ jagatīpūjyaṁ nega
rddudeḷege cāḷukyakuḷa . v® . hēḷāsādhitamāgalanyamahigaḷ vikrāntamaṁ tāḷdidaṁ cōḷavyāḷagajā
ri kēraḷakuḷōdanvadghanaurvvāgni pāṁcāḷadhvāṁtadinēṁdranaṁdhravipinaprōddāmadāvā gni nēpāḷābhīḷagha
nāghanōgrapavanaṁ permmāḍi bhūpāḷaka . jayalakṣmīpati cakravarttitiḷakaṁ bhūpāḷa sarvvajñanudgha
yaśōvyāvṛtadigvibhāganasuhṛdbhūbhṛtkubhṛtpavanōdayamaṁ vinatakṣamāpatiśirō ratnaprabhādhautapā
dayugaṁ vēditasarvvavidyanesedaṁbhūlōkamallōrvvipaṁ . koṁga kaḷiṁga vaṁga khasa kēraḷa pallava pāṇḍyacōḷa cērāṁga turuṣkagau
ḍaḍahaḷāmaru māḷava gūrjjarādi dēśaṁgaḷanotti taṁnṛpara kappamanuḷduṟe kādi tanna sainyaṁgaḷa taṁduveṁdaḍidirārjjagadēka
nṛpādhināthanoḷ . svastisamastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja para mēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ
satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatpratāpa cakravartti jagadēkamalladēvarkka lyāṇada nelevīḍino
ḷ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamira . vara jaṁbūdvīpadoḷ raṁjisu
vudu bharatakṣētramā kṣētradoḷu bandhuramantākuntaḷaṁ tadviṣayadoḷatiśōbhā spadaṁ beḷvalaṁ bittaradiṁdā nāḍo
ḷoppaṁbaḍedudu padineṁṭagrahāraṁ tadabhyantaradoḷ lakṣmīvihāraṁ negarddudu naṟugundābhidhānāgrahāraṁ .
kaṁ . beḷevudu mattarkkhāḍiyanaḷumbamāgalke keyvolaṁ bahudhānyāvaḷiyaṁ śrēyaṟphaḷa maṁ beḷe
vudu tadgrāmapāḷakargganavarataṁ . v® . moreva madāḷimāle jaḍivunmadakōkiḷamāle pāṭhamaṁ
parivaḍigeyva rājaśukamāle manō ryānadiṁda saṁcaripa marāḷa māle naladāḍuva mattamayū
ramāle nōḷpara manamaṁ paḷancaleyalī naṟugundavē rājikuṁ karaṁgi . v® . rasavanā kaṁda jaṁbū panasa kada
ḷi kharjjūra jaṁbīra nāraṁga samudyannāḷikēraṁ prakara phaḷarasāsvādanaṁ tuṣṭiyaṁ puṭṭise śākhācchāye
taṇpaṁ kuḍe kuḍe mudamaṁ padminī saurabhaṁ śrīmadudyānadoḷadhikapa
dhaśrāntiyaṁ pānthayūtha . taḷiraṁ pēṟirddaśōkadrumasamudayadiṁ patrasantānadiṁ kaṇgo
ḷipudyannāgavallīkuḷaviḷasanadiṁ pūta] yeḷedeṁgiṁ paṇta nāraṁga dineseva sitāṁbhōjanī
rējaṣaṇḍāvaḷiyiṁ lakṣmīkaraṁ tatpuravara dyānamāḷāviḷāsa . v® . vipuḷaprākā
ra cārudhvajakuḷaviḷasadramyaharmmyaṁgaḷiṁ raṁjipa nōttuṁga dēvāḷaya viḷasanadiṁ śrīnivā
sadvijādhīśapavitrāvāsavistāradineseva vaṇiggēhasaṁdōhadiṁ raṁjipudettaṁ nōrppaḍaṁ śrīkaramene na
ṟugundaṁ sadānandakanda . v® . praguṇa pārvvariṁda gnihōtrigaḷiṁda
skhaḷitāhitāgnigaḷinā sarvvakratusōmayājigaḷa marinudya dvēdavēdāntavēdi
gaḷiṁ śrīnaṟugundavūrjjitamenikkuṁ nikhiḷāgamasmṛti purāṇanyāyaśa
bdārtthaśāstrayathārtthatva kavitvavi dvijñātatatvargguṇōdayarajñāna tamōdinēśare
nalinnūṟippadiṁbarmmahatvayutarttāvesedirddarūrjjitaguṇabhrājiṣṇugaḷ jiṣṇuga
ḷ . gadya . svastiyamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānapārāyaṇajapasa
mādhiśīḷasaṁpannaruṁ śāśvatīkṛtapratipannaru prāmāṇyapratipā danahētutri
kāṇḍamīmāṁsāmānasasarōvararāja pratipāḷanaśīḷaruṁ viditāṣṭādaśapurāṇa
kāvyanāṭakanāṭikādinikhiḷasāhityaruṁ yajanayājanādhyayanādhyāpanadā
napratigrahadharmmaṣaṭkarmmasamavētaruṁ pradhāna santānakamahījātaruṁ śrīma
dbhagavatīdēvīlabdhavaraprasādaruṁ samastadāna negardda śrīmanmahāgrahāraṁ
piriya naṟuguṁdadaśēṣamahājanaṁga cchāyeyoḷirddu samasta dha(ṁ)rmmaṁ
gaḷaṁ svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuttamire . kaṁ . nenipudā purikēri gaḷiṁ nālkaṟiṁdamavaṟo
ḷ mauktikahārada nāyakamaṇivoludāra sedirkkuṁ [.] paṁcamahāyajñavratasaṁci
tapuṇyaprabhāvarakhiḷōrvvīnāthāṁcitacaraṇa ralliyayvattayvar . kaṁ . Ā dvijaro
ḷīśacaraṇābjadvaṁdvānandamattamadhupaṁ śrī dvibhu nācayaṣaḍaṁgiyeṁbaṁ nega
rdda . Ā vibhuvina sati vimaḷayaśōvati hitacāritrāvanijeyenisi negarddaḷi
ḷāvaḷayaṁ pogaḷe taṁna mahimōnnatiyaṁ . Avarirvva paramōtsava diṁde manōnurāgamāgire Avanista
vanīyakīrtti lakṣmībhavanaṁ dēcayaṣaḍaṁgi sidaṁ . Anupamanakhiḷajaganmaṇḍananenisida dē
caṇāryyanātmāṁganeyuṁ vinayāvanate śrījakkaṇabbeyaṁ pogaḷadarāru . vri .
paramapativratāguṇada mahatvadoḷu rateyoḷārppinoḷu vimaḷa
śīḷadoḷuṁnatiyoḷu vivēkadoḷu dore negardirddarunnati jagaṁ parahitanityeya niyatasa
tyeyanoppuva jakkaṇāṁbeya . Avariganaṁtakīrtti nudayisidaṁ bhāratībhavanananūnadānaparitarppitavi
prakadaṁbakaṁ kaḷārṇnavavidhu satyaśaucaniyataṁ nijanirmmaḷavaṁśa nogedaṁ jagaduttamavṛttanartthiyiṁ .
kaṁ . Ātana tammaṁ bhuvanavinūtaṁ vidyāvidhātanāśritavibudha surabhūjātaṁ śrīśaṁkaraṁ karaṁ raṁji
sida . tatpahajaṁ dvijanṛpasaṁsatsadanōjvaḷitaratnadīpaṁ prabhu nityōtsavadiṁ nāraṇāryyanosedudayisi
daṁ paramaśrīlakṣmīśa varavṛṣavipravaravṛtta nārāyaṇarenalkaraṁ dorevettaru śaṁ
karanārāyaṇaraṁ śaṁkaranārāyaṇōpamānarenutaṁ ḷiḷātaḷadoḷesevarasadṛśamahimaru .
v® . Am®tapayōdhisanjanitalakṣmige tāne samānameṁbina madēbhayāne vidrumaruciraṁ
jitādhare bṛhatkacabhāre patibratāguṇōttamasiriyā ppidaḷu dharitriyoḷ . vitatātmīyānvayāṁbhōni
dhi jananateyiṁ caṁdrasauṁdaryyasiddhārtthateyiṁ nārāyaṇa saṁpaṁnateyiṁ sadbhūṣaṇāḷaṁkaraṇa vima
ḷasampattiyiṁdeyde lakṣmīsati lakṣmīdēvigeṁduṁ doreyinisi mahi vettaḷu . kuladaivaṁ kīrttinārāyaṇavibhu
vibudhādhīśvaraṁ śaṁkaraṁ viśvalalāmaṁ svāmi putrarṇnegardda maduvaṇa tyujvaḷatējacaṁdraneṁduṁ tamagene negarddarddhātri
yoḷtāratārācaḷahārōdyadyaśarśaṁkara budhavara nārāyaṇāryya . Āvibhugaḷa guṇa sadbhā
vaṁ pāṁḍavargge puṁḍarīkākṣanavolu bhāvaviśuddha sātvikabhāvaṁ vibudhagurusatatayutaṁ dhavaḷi
tasanmārgganamaḷaparipūrṇnakaḷaṁ kuvaḷayakṛdayānaṁdō reyoḷu . tadanujanasadṛśamahimā
spadanuṁnutaharitagōtravikasatpaṁkējadinēśanātmavidyāvihitaṁ dēvaṇāryya . Antā śaṁkara nārāyaṇabha
ṭṭarttamma bhāvaṁdirbhbhadrabhaṭṭaruṁ dēvaṇabhaṭṭarssahitaṁ samālōcisi śrīkīrtti nārāyaṇadēvarggā hēmagēriyalli sarvvanama
syamāgi bhūmiyaṁ paḍedu biḍalvēḷku(ṁ)meṁdu niścaysalanaṁtaramā kēriya mahimeyeṁteṁ daḍe . śrīvibudhādhīśvaranamarāvatigaṁ
rājarājanaḷakāpurigaṁ bhāvise phaṇirājana bhōgāvatigaṁ hēmagēri tā Ā kēriyavarggaḷakhiḷavyākaraṇasmṛtipu
rāṇavēdāḷaṁkārākīrṇnaragrapūjege lōkādhikarēkavākyarayvattayvar śaṁkara nārāyaṇapadapaṁkajamakaraṁdabhṛṁgarāśri
tajanatāsaṁkalpānōkaharenalēṁ kṛtakṛtyarō jitātmarayvattayvar . svasti śrīma ccāḷukya pratāpacakravartti jagadēka
malladēvavarṣada 10 neya prabhavasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇadamavāsye sōmavāra puṣya nakṣatraṁ vyatīpātaṁ saṁkrā
ntiyintinituṁ kūḍalā puṇyatithiyoḷā mahājanaṁgaḷa divyaśrīpādapadmaṁgaḷge śaṁkara nārāyaṇabhaṭṭarssaṁpūrṇna
suvarṇna pūjeyaṁ māḍiyavara kayyoḷu bagguḍada samīpada vāyavya geya sthaḷadalu sarvvanama
syamāgi paḍedu śrīkīrttinārāyaṇadēvargga biṭṭa mattaraydu kaṁmaṁ nūṟayvattī dharmmamanalliyayvattayvaru svadharmmadiṁ pratipā
ḷisuvar . kaṁ . sarvvanamasyamenalu paḍedurvviyanavaralli kīrttinārāyaṇaṁ sarvva sarvvōrvvi gurvvina bagguḍada pava
nadiśeyurvvareyoḷ praṇayade śaṁkaranārāyaṇaralliya kaṁmavasugeyoḷu keṁmane dhikamāge varadhāriṇiyaṁ
śrīviṣṇugaydu mattaranittaru . Avaraḷiyaṁdiru harigirīśaviriṁcapratimariṁdirā stutyakēśavamādhavarāmadēva
[ ne] meccadarār . v® . śucidakṣaṁ prabhuśaktiyuktanativiśvāsāspadamitranudghacaritra prakarav®ttaṁ tānenuttartthiyiṁ
daceḷēṁdrōpamadhairyyanāryyanolaviṁdaṁ candrabhaṭṭaṁge nīṁ śucidharmmā deṁdu pracayakkeydi
sutirddanurvvi pogaḷalu śrīśaṁkarāryyōktiyiṁ . kaṁ . biṁnaṇade vidyeyoḷe meccipaṁ sāhityaikōnna
tanenipaṁ pūliya soṁnaṁdara vāsudēvavibudhādhīśa . rasadiṁ śabdadinartthadinesedire śāsana dyamenalu posadese pasa
risalu viracisidaṁ sarvvajñapaṭṭavarddhanavibudha . sulalitarēkheyenal vāglalaneya (.) toppe baredaṁ bhūdēvalalāmaṁ
kisuvāyara kuḷatiḷakaṁ rūpajhaṣapatākaṁ tīka . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ vēti dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsva rggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutapadaṁ . pūliya
sātōjana putra ciṇnōjana khaṁḍaraṇe .
Digital edition of SII 18.150 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
